title: Sexually Transmitted Infection Screening * Syphilis - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Health Care > Sexually Transmitted Infection Screening * Syphilis 5 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter LGBTQ2+ Issues Native American Community Syphilis Transgender Individuals Women No Filter LGBTQ2+ Issues Native American Community Syphilis Transgender Individuals Women Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF 211INFO 211INFO MATERNAL AND CHILD HEALTH PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF 211info's Maternal and Child Health Program provides specialized information, referral, and follow-up services to individuals and family members of all genders covering needs and questions related to pregnancy, maternal and child health, sexual and reproductive health, and women's health across the life span, including resources for women with breast cancer. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-6pm Email 211 Visit Website More Details CASCADE AIDS PROJECT TESTING4ALL Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides rapid HIV testing, syphilis, hepatitis C, and prevention counseling. 520 NW Davis Street Suite 215 Portland, OR 97209 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday/Wednesday 10am-4pm Email (503) 223-5907 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CLACKAMAS COUNTY HEALTH CENTERS SUNNYSIDE HEALTH CENTER FREE HIV AND SYPHILIS TESTING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Sunnyside Health Center is partnering with Cascade Aids Project to offer HIV testing. Other services include treatment referrals; safer sex materials (condoms, lube, prep/pep); and health insurance navigation. 9775 SE Sunnyside Road Suite 200 Clackamas, OR 97015 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Thursday 5pm-7pm Email (971) 361-8801 Get Directions Visit Website More Details MULTNOMAH COUNTY HEALTH DEPARTMENT HIV COMMUNITY TEST SITE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides anonymous and confidential HIV, hepatitis C, and syphilis testing. HIV testing is done by taking a blood or oral sample, with rapid 20-minute test results available for those who qualify. Results are available by phone or in person. Condoms and other safe sex supplies also available. Offers HIV prevention counseling and PrEP (PRe Exposure Prophylaxis) navigation. 619 NW 6th Avenue Portland, OR 97209 Eligibility: -Standard HIV test: Unrestricted -Rapid HIV test: Men who have or have had sex with men, injection drug users, and partners of people living with HIV -Hepatitis C test: Any individual with a history of injection drug use -Syphilis test: Men who have sex with men, trans folks who may be at risk Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-4:30pm Test Results Line: Monday-Friday 1:30pm-4pm Email (503) 988-3700 Get Directions Visit Website More Details YAMHILL COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH IMMUNIZATIONS AND STI TESTING/TREATMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Services provides adult, child, and infant vaccines. Also, sexually transmitted infection (STI) testing and treatment for: Chlamydia, Syphilis, HIV, Gonorrhea, Hepatitis B, Hepatitis C, and Trichomoniasis 310 NE Kirby Street McMinnville, OR 97128 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm (503) 434-7525 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CASCADE AIDS PROJECT TESTING4ALL CLACKAMAS COUNTY HEALTH CENTERS FREE HIV AND SYPHILIS TESTING MULTNOMAH COUNTY HEALTH DEPARTMENT HIV COMMUNITY TEST SITE YAMHILL COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH IMMUNIZATIONS AND STI TESTING/TREATMENT
